title: platanus × acerifolia f. kelseyana
intro: Platanus × acerifolia f. kelseyana, also known as Kelsey's London Planetree, is a hybrid tree cultivar that is a cross between the Oriental Planetree (Platanus orientalis) and the American Planetree (Platanus occidentalis). The medicinal properties of Kelsey's London Planetree include its bark and sap, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Kelsey's London Planetree can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
